document.title: Physical Parameters of omay® PC Film G42

sourceSummary.oneLine: Material property sheet listing physical, mechanical, electrical, thermal, and flammability parameters for omay® PC Film G42.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides reference-only material parameter values and experiment methods for omay® PC Film G42.
keyPoints: Specific gravity is listed as 1.2 g/cm3 by ISO 1183.
Haze is listed as >80% and transmittance as 88% by ASTM D1003.
Continuous service temperature is listed as -60 to 125 ℃ by UL746B.
Flammability is listed as V-2/VTM-2 with E249605.

evidence.claim: The document is a physical parameter sheet for omay® PC Film G42.
evidence.evidenceText: Physical Parameters of omay® PC Film G42

evidence.claim: Specific gravity is 1.2 g/cm3 using ISO 1183.
Haze is greater than 80% using ASTM D1003.
Surface pencil hardness is listed as 2B to B.
Tensile strength is 62 MPa using ISO 527.
Elongation at break is greater than 50% using ISO 527.
Flexural strength is 88 MPa using ISO 178.
Dielectric strength is 30 KV/mm using ASTM D149.
Surface resistance is 1.00E+16 Ω/square using ASTM D257.
Glass transition temperature is 153 ℃ using ISO 11357.
Continuous service temperature is -60 to 125 ℃ using UL746B.
Flammability is listed as V-2/VTM-2 with E249605.
The test data is for reference only and is not an absolute application indicator.
evidence.evidenceText: Note: This test is for reference only, not for absolute indicator of application.
